JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.social.economics.resources

Uses of Package
org.jscience.social.economics.resources

Packages that use org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.jscience.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.jscience.social.arts.theater
- plays, performances, dramatic arts.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources used by org.jscience.social.architecture
    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources used by org.jscience.social.architecture.traffic
    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
    Machine
    Represents a complex tool (machine) that consumes energy to perform work.
    PhysicalObject
    Represents a crafted object that can be moved and used (e.g., tools, appliances, small structures).
    Tool
    Represents a tool used to build or repair other objects.
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources used by org.jscience.social.arts
    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).

    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).

    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources used by org.jscience.social.economics.resources
    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
    Machine
    Represents a complex tool (machine) that consumes energy to perform work.
    Mineral
    A class representing Minerals.
    Natural
    Represents resources found naturally in the environment (planets, stars, living organisms, minerals). * @version 1.1
    PhysicalObject
    Represents a crafted object that can be moved and used (e.g., tools, appliances, small structures).
    Solid
    Represents natural resources in solid form (e.g., stones, rocks). * @version 1.1
    Store
    Defines the capability of a resource to contain other resources or entities.
    Thing
    Represents a tangible physical object that occupies space and may have a 3D representation.
    Tool
    Represents a tool used to build or repair other objects.
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources used by org.jscience.social.history.archeology
    Class
    Description
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
    PhysicalObject
    Represents a crafted object that can be moved and used (e.g., tools, appliances, small structures).
